M8/624, JUDGE W DOUGLASS, CSR R BARULICH, CLK H HAMILTON CASE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL, BRENDA CRUZ KEITH FOR PLTF WILLIAM DABEL, NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR DEFENDANTS. TESTIMENTARY & EXHIBIT EVIDENCE TAKEN, COURT GIVES JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF & AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR RENT & DAMAGES OF $3813.24, $720. FEES, COSTS PER COST MEMORANDUM.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRAY, STEVE GRAY, NANCY BIMBO, TILLIE GRAY, STEVE JR BIMBO, PAT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3180 MISSION ST, S.F. $3,813.24 RENT, $720.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,533.24, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF ENTITLED TO COSTS PER COST BILL.
